name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
description: The product contains hard-coded credentials such as passwords or cryptographic keys. This manifests as inbound credentials (default admin accounts with unchangeable passwords) or outbound credentials (front-end systems connecting to back-end services with embedded credentials), both enabling unauthorized access.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL or META node contains literal credential values (passwords, keys, tokens) that flow to an AUTH node or EXTERNAL node for authentication, without a STORAGE node (secure credential store, environment variable, vault) providing the credential dynamically.
